list.name: device
list.label: Device
list.query: SELECT device_name AS __text, device_name AS __value FROM inventory GROUP BY device_name ORDER BY device_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at))), 0) * 8 AS "Throughput (bps)", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'TRAFFIC' AND metric_name LIKE '%in-octets%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at))), 0) * 8 AS "Throughput (bps)", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'TRAFFIC' AND metric_name LIKE '%out-octets%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) ORDER BY collected_at;

panels.title: Packet Drops per Interface (delta per interval)

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) AS "Drops", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'DROPS' AND metric_name LIKE '%discard%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) ORDER BY collected_at;
